setup: 6D Einstein-Maxwell + Lambda6 on T^2 fibre over the static free family; three-valued verdicts, obstructions machine-extracted
prior_art: Andriot et al. JHEP 12(2022)026 (type II sugra, group manifolds)
next_leg: Einstein-frame potential + moduli masses (bridge verifies numerically)

entries.obstruction: n^2 = 0 forced (no constant-moduli vacuum; volume runaway)
entries.potential: V ~ n²/detM (Jordan source), no critical point

entries.note: shape+axion SL(2,R)/SO(2) coset exactly flat: the vacuum manifold IS the coset

entries.obstruction: monodromy = axion shift (large diffeomorphism): potential is m-independent; SS twist on metric-only T² stabilizes NOTHING

config.twist: geometric flux m (frame e^{m w1} dw2)

entries.obstruction: Maxwell violated: nabla_M G^{M w2} = -mn e^{-2mw1}/(Φ1²Φ2²) != 0; the flux quantum must wrap the internal volume form n e^{m w1} dw1^dw2
one flat direction SURVIVES (Φ2 branch); global compactness of the 2D affine group UNPROVEN (classic geometric-flux obstruction on T²)
entries.potential: Φ1² = (4Φ2²m²+3n²)/(-2Λ6Φ2²); local reduction proven, compactification unproven

entries.obstruction: (2Λ6·detM + 3n²) = 0 is forced: freezing the volume anywhere else is inconsistent (§111-trap analogue)
